mapper.select:
SELECT id, tenant_id, certification_id, contact_name, contact_id_card, contact_phone, contact_phone_verify_code, contact_landline, contact_wechat_openid, contact_wechat_scanned, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM registry_certification_contact
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND certification_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.certificationId}, '%')
AND contact_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.contactName}, '%')
AND contact_id_card LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.contactIdCard}, '%')
AND contact_phone LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.contactPhone}, '%')
